name: Textured Cotton Overshirt
description: A heavier-weight overshirt built to layer or stand alone. Simple construction, no branding, the kind of piece I reach for without thinking.
whyThisFitsMyArchive: This is the shirt I actually wear on a Tuesday. The weight holds its shape without feeling stiff, and off-white works as my off-duty uniform piece. It doesn't ask to be noticed, which is the point.
whatItReplaces: Replaces a much thinner shirt-jacket I owned that couldn't hold its shape after a few washes. This one has enough weight to actually function as outerwear, not just look like it.
whyIChooseThis: Over thinner poplin shirts: this has enough body to wear alone. Over designer equivalents: same silhouette, a fraction of the price, and I can actually replace it when it wears out.
whatItPairsWithInMyCollection: Supima tee underneath in cooler weather. Worn open over a plain tee on warmer days. Grounds well with the wool trousers.
layeringCombinations: Over the Supima tee as a light jacket. Over the linen shirt on cooler evenings. Under the wool coat if it's genuinely cold, though that's rare.
colourCombinations: Off-white is the one I default to. Stone and navy round it out for variety without adding real complexity to the wardrobe.
bestSeason: Spring and autumn — the in-between weeks a heavier jacket is overkill
bestOccasions: Casual weekday, weekend, anything that doesn't need a real jacket
costPerWearReasoning: ₹7,990, worn most weeks between seasons. It does the job of a light jacket at shirt prices, which is most of the value case.
whatMakesItTimeless: Neutral colourway, simple construction, nothing to date. It'll look the same in ten years because there's nothing trend-driven about it.
whatProblemItSolves: A shirt with enough weight to look intentional but relaxed enough for daily rotation.
whatCouldReplaceIt: A lighter Massimo Dutti oxford for warmer days, but this specific weight is what I reach for most.
layeringOver: the Supima tee or the linen shirt
layeringUnder: the wool coat, though that's rare
alternativeUnder3000: Zara Oversized Shirt Jacket (~₹2,990 at zara.com/in) — lighter construction
alternativeUnder10000: COS Relaxed Overshirt (~₹6,000-₹8,000 import via cos.com)
buyRecommendation: Wait for Sale — this drops to ₹3,500-₹4,500 in clearance. Not urgent to buy at full price given the Zara alternative.
